title: keetia mannii
intro: Keetia mannii, also known as African keetia or wild gardenia, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Keetia mannii include reducing fever, treating malaria, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tonics, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
